action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end pipeline with multi-GPU training, offline-safe prediction, and immediate eval to validate contract and measure runtime. Decision: implement a strong baseline using pretrained ResNet-50 IN1K V1 with ImageNet normalization, balanced sampling to reduce real-domain dominance, light augmentation, DDP training, EMA-free simple setup, train 2 epochs, test predict.py locally, then submit eval.
action.command: python -m torch.distributed.run --nproc_per_node=4 train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 64 --num_workers 6 --lr 3e-4 --output_dir checkpoints/baseline && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline/best.pt --output pred_check.json --batch_size 128 --num_workers 4
